title: Druggability and Genetic Variability of the ADP-bound Pocket of SARS-CoV-2 RNA-dependent RNA polymerase NiRAN domain Across Coronaviruses and SARS-CoV-2 Samples
author: Setayesh Yazdani
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document is about the druggability and genetic variability of the ADP-bound pocket of SARS-CoV-2 RNA-dependent RNA polymerase (RdRp) NiRAN domain across coronaviruses and SARS-CoV-2 samples. This report also accompanies  this post  on https://openlabnotebooks.org/.
steps_raw: This document is about the druggability and genetic variability of the ADP-bound pocket of SARS-CoV-2 RNA-dependent RNA polymerase (RdRp) NiRAN domain across coronaviruses and SARS-CoV-2 samples. This report also accompanies  this post  on https://openlabnotebooks.org/.
